label: PASS

label: PASS
rationale: START_req is valid from IDLE and changes ReEncryptState to PENDING. LastReEncryptLBA is valid in PENDING and must be 0xFFFFFFFF_FFFFFFFF when no LBA has been successfully re-encrypted; the target returns the all-ones sentinel.

label: FAIL
